# @dbt-labs/biga

## 1.7.1

### Patch Changes

- 76936f9: Updates dependencies to use cataglog: to ensure same versions across pkgs

## 1.7.0

### Minor Changes

- 3150518: Add function tokens

## 1.6.0

### Minor Changes

- 5c823c7: Add borderTinted for lighter usage.

## 1.5.0

### Minor Changes

- 1ad46af: Update ansi colors and add tints.

## 1.4.0

### Minor Changes

- e080815: Add mid grays, ANSI, tints, and gradient colors.

## 1.3.0

### Minor Changes

- dcd971f: Revert all checkbox and radio changes from past few versions

## 1.2.0

### Minor Changes

- 4b5be40: Neutralize BrandSelection tokens and add some midgrays.

## 1.1.0

### Minor Changes

- 5862a87: Add canvas tokens for managing react-flow canvas and dots. Adjust syntax tokens in dark mode.

## 1.0.0

### Major Changes

- 8cfbf28: Brand refresh is updating visual presentation across the board. Color tokens impact every surface area and feeds into app-nav and sourdough. eslint rules are adjusted to meet new tokens. Migration is a package bump across all 4 packages (app-nav, biga, eslint-plugin-biga, and sourdough.

## 0.10.0

### Minor Changes

- 1ac4028: Add ssyntax tokens.

## 0.9.0

### Minor Changes

- e6f0984: Add monochrome color tokens for charts. Adjust neutral-muted and main-hover/active primitives for better contrast.

## 0.8.0

### Minor Changes

- 6aa279d: Update hex value for gray-400 to be 0.5 higher contrast.

## 0.7.0

### Minor Changes

- ee17eba: Bumps TS to 5.4.5 which affects all the packages. Main changes are made to make that work. Updates to exports for stable-api for use in consumers

## 0.6.0

### Minor Changes

- 58ef56b: Add additional viz hover and muted tokens.
- bec84d2: Update duotone values for better contrast.

## 0.5.0

### Minor Changes

- decd7ba: Adds new badge tokens and updates a few existing tokens.

## 0.4.0

### Minor Changes

- 3284f0a: Add border viz muted tokens. Update fg viz tokens

## 0.3.0

### Minor Changes

- 9e07ae8: Update color tokens for overlay and shadow support. Update mapping for duotone tokens.

## 0.2.5

### Patch Changes

- 2f007ea: Adds .light as additional selector for forcing light styles

## 0.2.4

### Patch Changes

- 45f7110: Tweak biga documentation to reference legacy light-blue

## 0.2.3

### Patch Changes

- 120c6b5: Tweak invalid token rule regex to avoid false positive in html template strings

## 0.2.2

### Patch Changes

- 357b754: Attempting to fix multi-package release issues

## 0.2.1

### Patch Changes

- 6eb96da: Loosen biga deps rules

## 0.2.0

### Minor Changes

- 004411f: Dag and viz tokens

## 0.0.9

### Patch Changes

- 5882938: Minor tweak to values

## 0.0.8

### Patch Changes

- ffded12: Changes Primary/Secondary to Main/Alt

## 0.0.7

### Patch Changes

- 606513a: Update to latest iteration of tokens

## 0.0.6

### Patch Changes

- 4d4ab7e: Updates to latest tokens including camelCase naming convention

## 0.0.5

### Patch Changes

- 045055a: Change token names to camelCase

## 0.0.4

### Patch Changes

- 8ecda12: Export token-mappings.md to help devs find what tokens belong to which TW class

## 0.0.3

### Patch Changes

- 62c9826: Fixes release process + adds dbt- prefix to tokens

## 0.0.2

### Patch Changes

- 4f0b927: Adds @dbt-labs/biga package used to transform variable exports from design system into css custom properties.
  This serves as a POC of setting up the pipeline to generate tokens. Much more to come soon.
